hwpConversion.title: HWP files require conversion

description.line1: format is needed. Please convert to .hwpx and try again.
description.line2: You must follow these steps for conversion:

steps.step1: Open the .hwp file in Hancom Office.
steps.step2: Click [File] > [Save As] from the top menu.
steps.step3: Select 'Hangeul Standard Document (.hwpx)' as the file format and save.

hwpConversion.guideToConvert: If you don't have Hancom Office, please use the link below to convert.

description.line1: The selected file cannot be uploaded.
description.line2: Only Hangeul Standard Document (hwp, hwpx) format is supported. Please select the correct format file and try uploading again.

description.line1: File size must be 30MB or less.
description.line2: The uploadable file size has been exceeded.

duplicateFile.title: Duplicate file
duplicateFile.description: The same file has already been added.

invalidXml.title: Did you rename the file extension to hwpx directly?

description.line1: Please convert using the method below and upload again.
description.line2: You must follow these steps for conversion:

steps.step1: Open the hwp file in Hancom Office.
steps.step2: Click [File] > [Save As] from the top menu.
steps.step3: Select 'Hangeul Standard Document (.hwpx)' as the file format and save.

invalidXml.guideToConvert: If you don't have Hancom Office, please use the link below to convert.
